strengths: Possesses over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and cloud platforms.
Demonstrates strong technical leadership and community engagement through open-source foundations (GISCollective) and organizing workshops.
Has practical cloud and infrastructure fluency, evidenced by utilizing AWS CDK at Optilyz and Kubernetes for GISCollective.
concerns: Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
AI experience is limited to recent contributor-level work on MCP code generators at re:cinq, lacking director-level AI strategy expertise.
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years in software engineering with solid technical fluency in cloud infrastructure (e.g., AWS CDK at Optilyz and Kubernetes at GISCollective) and a proven track record of inspiring others through technical workshops. However, this is a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused heavily on AI Strategy and executive advising. Bogdan's AI experience is limited to recent tactical work on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, which falls short of the required 'recognized expertise in AI' and strategic partnership experience needed to advise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption. Because the core AI strategy and advisory competencies are mostly absent, the overall fit for this specific role is low.
